title: Veterinary drug labelling draft guidance for industry : Closed consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Veterinary drug labelling draft guidance for industry: Closed consultation

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from March 7, 2022, to May 6, 2022.
Health Canada sought feedback on the draft guidance for labelling veterinary drugs. This guidance outlines Canada’s labelling requirements and recommendations.
The draft guidance was intended to:
- provide helpful and sufficient information to industry on how to meet the requirements of the Food and Drug Regulations
- help industry provide quality labels to Health Canada for review
- present the information in a user-friendly way for easy and efficient navigation
The final guidance document will be clear and help industry when it files labels as part of the regulatory submission process for veterinary drugs .

## Who was the focus of this consultation
This consultation was for the veterinary drug industry and other interested stakeholders.

## Key questions for discussion
We sought feedback to ensure that this technical guidance was clear and as user-friendly as possible.
The final updated guidance document will reflect the input from this consultation.
- Veterinary drugs - Management of regulatory submissions guidance
Veterinary Drugs Directorate Health Products and Food Branch Email: consultationvdd-dmv@hc-sc.gc.ca
